name: Roadway AI

fields.label: IP Address
fields.description: The IP address of the user. This is only used for geolocation and won't be stored.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: The unique user identifier set by you

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: The distinct ID after calling identify.

user_id.title: User ID

fields.description: A distinct ID randomly generated prior to calling identify.

fields.description: The unique identifier of the group that performed this event.

fields.description: A random id that is unique to an event.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event.

fields.label: Event Properties
fields.description: An object of key-value pairs that represent additional data to be sent along with the event.

event_properties.title: Event Properties
event_properties.description: An object of key-value pairs that represent additional data to be sent along with the event.

fields.label: Event Context
fields.description: An object of key-value pairs that provides useful context about the event.

context.title: Event Context
context.description: An object of key-value pairs that provides useful context about the event.

fields.label: Event Name
fields.description: The name of the action being performed.

event.title: Event Name
event.description: The name of the action being performed.

fields.description: The Event Original Name, if applicable

name.description: The Event Original Name, if applicable

fields.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.
